heading_content_part: Pervasive Group Inc complies with the EU-U.S. Data Privacy Framework (EU-U.S. DPF) and the UK Extension to the EU-U.S. DPF as set forth by the U.S. Department of Commerce.  Pervasive Group Inc has certified to the U.S. Department of Commerce that it adheres to the EU-U.S. Data Privacy Framework Principles (EU-U.S. DPF Principles) with regard to the processing of personal data received from the European Union in reliance on the EU-U.S. DPF, and to the UK Extension to the EU-U.S. DPF Principles with regard to the processing of personal data received from the United Kingdom (and Gibraltar) in reliance on the UK Extension to the EU-U.S. DPF.   If there is any conflict between the terms in this privacy policy and the EU-U.S. DPF Principles or the UK Extension to the EU-U.S. DPF Principles, the Principles shall govern.  To learn more about the Data Privacy Framework (DPF) program, and to view our certification, please visit

decoder_heading: THE TYPES OF INFORMATION THAT WE COLLECT

heading_content_part: THE TYPES OF INFORMATION THAT WE COLLECT

decoder_heading: We collect certain information that You voluntarily provide to us, such as when you register to create an account or send us an email.
ident_heading: We collect certain information that You voluntarily provide to us, such as when you register to create an account or send us an email.
heading_content_part: We collect certain information that You voluntarily provide to us, such as when you register to create an account or send us an email. When MMGuardian is used on Your device or Your Child’s device we also collect information from the devices in order to provide You with the parental control service.

decoder_heading: We collect certain information that You voluntarily provide to us, such as when you register to create an account or send us an email.
ident_heading: We collect certain information that You voluntarily provide to us, such as when you register to create an account or send us an email.
heading_content_part: The types of information that we collect include: email address, phone numbers, mobile device identifiers, internet protocol address, usage information and optionally various information from Your Child’s phone, which may include location. We also collect your address if you purchase a MMGuardian phone from our website. Full details of what and why this information is collected is detailed in the paragraphs below.

decoder_heading: Information Collected when using MMGuardian applications on Your or Your Child’s device:
ident_heading: Information Collected when using MMGuardian applications on Your or Your Child’s device:
heading_content_part: Information Collected when using MMGuardian applications on Your or Your Child’s device:Our applications may at times need to connect to the internet in a variety of circumstances, including without limitation: (i) to connect to our server when registering or logging in to the app, (ii) to send changes to configurations made from within the app to ensure that all apps and the parent web portal remain synchronised, (iii) to send alerts, (iv) to send usage reports. When mobile data is used to connect to the internet, you may be charged by your carrier.

decoder_heading: Information Collected when using MMGuardian applications on Your or Your Child’s device:
ident_heading: Information Collected when using MMGuardian applications on Your or Your Child’s device:
heading_content_part: When the MMGuardian application for Your parent phone is installed, we may collect or process:

decoder_heading: Information Collected when using MMGuardian applications on Your or Your Child’s device:
ident_heading: Information Collected when using MMGuardian applications on Your or Your Child’s device:
heading_content_part: - On registration of the application we will collect the parent (admin) email address, password, device identifiers including but not limited to: the IMEI, or the IMSI, or the ICCID, or the ESN of the device and the model and operating system version of the phone. We may in some cases also collect the phone number of the device that the application is installed onto. We also collect and store device information such as device manufacturer, model, mobile OS, and wireless carrier info for the purpose of enhancing the performance of our mobile applications, by means of possible customization for certain type of devices.This information is only collected if the app is registered.

decoder_heading: Information Collected when using MMGuardian applications on Your or Your Child’s device:
ident_heading: Information Collected when using MMGuardian applications on Your or Your Child’s device:
heading_content_part: - We collect information about application usage and interaction of the MMGuardian application (“Application Usage Information”), such as which screens are viewed and for how long, which buttons are pressed, and the performance of applications including situations in which the application experiences a serious error or crash. Collecting this information is of vital importance to us to be able to fix application issues and improve our products. Collection of this Application Usage Information is achieved by use of Google Analytics or Google Firebase Analytics or Facebook Analytics and Google Firebase Crash Reporting/Crashalytics.

decoder_heading: Information Collected when using MMGuardian applications on Your or Your Child’s device:
ident_heading: Information Collected when using MMGuardian applications on Your or Your Child’s device:
heading_content_part: When the MMGuardian application for Your Child’s device is installed, or, you use a MMGuardian phone purchased from us, we may collect or process:

decoder_heading: Information Collected when using MMGuardian applications on Your or Your Child’s device:
ident_heading: Information Collected when using MMGuardian applications on Your or Your Child’s device:
heading_content_part: - On registration of the application: the Parent (admin) email address, password, Parent and the Child phone number, Child’s contacts, and list of applications that are installed on the Child’s phone. We collect and store device identifiers including but not limited to: the IMEI, or the IMSI, or the ICCID, or the ESN of the device and the model and operating system version of the phone. We also collect and store device information such as device manufacturer, model, mobile OS, and wireless carrier info for the purpose of enhancing the performance of our mobile applications, by means of possible customization for certain type of devices. This information and the information described below is only collected if the app is registered.

decoder_heading: Information Collected when using MMGuardian applications on Your or Your Child’s device:
ident_heading: Information Collected when using MMGuardian applications on Your or Your Child’s device:
heading_content_part: - We collect information about application usage and interaction of the MMGuardian application (“Application Usage Information”), such as which screens are viewed and for how long, which buttons are pressed, and the performance of applications including situations in which the application experiences a serious error or crash. Collecting this information is of vital importance to us to be able to fix application issues and improve our products. Collection of this Application Usage Information is achieved by use of Google Analytics or Google Firebase Analytics or Facebook Analytics and Google Firebase Crash Reporting/Crashalytics.

decoder_heading: Information Collected when using MMGuardian applications on Your or Your Child’s device:
ident_heading: Information Collected when using MMGuardian applications on Your or Your Child’s device:
heading_content_part: - The location of your Child’s phone in a variety of circumstances, including without limitation: (i) when you request a location update by either an SMS command or from the MMGuardian Family Web Portal or application on Your own parent phone; (ii) when a pre-schedule location update (Track) is enabled. You should talk with Your child (especially if Your child is older than 13) and make sure that he or she understands that You will be tracking their location through MMGuardian.

decoder_heading: Information Collected when using MMGuardian applications on Your or Your Child’s device:
ident_heading: Information Collected when using MMGuardian applications on Your or Your Child’s device:
heading_content_part: - Your Child’s contacts in a variety of circumstances, including without limitation: (i) when the app is registered, (ii) when contacts are added or removed from the device. This is required to enable you to: view the contacts that your child has and to choose whether to allow or block communications with the contact, and to allow you to see contact names in detailed call or SMS reports.

decoder_heading: Information Collected when using MMGuardian applications on Your or Your Child’s device:
ident_heading: Information Collected when using MMGuardian applications on Your or Your Child’s device:
heading_content_part: - Information about the applications installed your Child’s device and the usage of the applications in a variety of circumstances, including without limitation: (i) when the app is registered, (ii) when applications are added or removed from the device, (iii) when an application is used. This is required to enable you to view the applications that your child has and to choose whether to allow or block use of the application, and to provide application usage reports.

decoder_heading: Information Collected when using MMGuardian applications on Your or Your Child’s device:
ident_heading: Information Collected when using MMGuardian applications on Your or Your Child’s device:
heading_content_part: - If You have enabled collection of SMS message details: SMS and MMS messages when SMS or MMS messages are received by or sent from Your Child’s phone. The information collected will include the time of the message, the message content text and the phone numbers and names of your Chid’s friends with whom the message is exchanged. This is required to enable you to view detailed SMS reports.

decoder_heading: Information Collected when using MMGuardian applications on Your or Your Child’s device:
ident_heading: Information Collected when using MMGuardian applications on Your or Your Child’s device:
heading_content_part: - If You have enabled collection of call details: Your Child’s detailed call history in a variety of circumstances, including the time and duration of the call, and the contact name and phone number of the person who was called or was calling your child. This is required to enable you to view detailed call reports.

decoder_heading: Information Collected when using MMGuardian applications on Your or Your Child’s device:
ident_heading: Information Collected when using MMGuardian applications on Your or Your Child’s device:
heading_content_part: - If You have enabled the call block function: The details of the blocked call or SMS or MMS message, including the time, blocked phone number, contact name and for messages the content text of the message.- If You have enabled the Web Filter function: the detailed web browsing history of your Child. The information will include the time and the web address (URL), and if the browsing attempt was blocked due to web filter configurations that You have set up, the reason for the block. This is required to enable you to view detailed web browsing history.

decoder_heading: Information Collected when using MMGuardian applications on Your or Your Child’s device:
ident_heading: Information Collected when using MMGuardian applications on Your or Your Child’s device:
heading_content_part: We do not collect the age, gender or date of birth of your Child.

This may include details of the device used to access the Website such as operating system, browser type, the address of a referring site (if any) and your activity on our Sites such as what pages were visited and what links were clicked. We may also collect or store Your IP address.

We treat your IP address as Personal Information.If you use the Contact Support form on our Website we will collect, store or process the email address that You provided.

heading_content_part: For further information about how Google Analytics information is collected and processed, please refer to How Google uses data when you use our partners’ sites or apps (www.google.com/policies/privacy/partners/). You can opt-out of Google Analytics tracking here (https://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout/).

decoder_heading: Information Collected by our “Sites” (our “Website” at www.mmguardian.com and our “Family Web Portal” at family.mmguardian.com)
ident_heading: Information Collected by our “Sites” (our “Website” at www.mmguardian.com and our “Family Web Portal” at family.mmguardian.com)
heading_content_part: Our website utilises Google Analytics, a web analytics tool by Google Inc. (“Google”). Google Analytics uses “cookies”, text files stored on your computer that enable analysis of how you use the website. The cookie-generated information about your use of this website is usually transmitted to and stored on a Google server in the United States. However, if you are in a country that is a member state of the European Union or a contracting party to the Agreement on the European Economic Area or in the United Kingdom (and Gibraltar), Google will first truncate your IP address. Only in exceptional situations will the full IP address be transmitted to a Google server in the United States and shortened there. Google will use such information to evaluate your use of the website, to compile reports on website activity and to provide other services to us in relation to website use and internet use. Google will not combine the IP address transmitted by your browser via Google Analytics with other Google data. You can disable cookies by setting your browser accordingly; however, if you do this you may not be able to use the full functionality of this website. Furthermore, you can prevent collection and transfer of the analytics data generated by cookies and relating to your use of the website (including your IP address) to Google, as well as the processing of such data by Google, by downloading and installing the browser plug-in available under the following link: https://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout/eula.html?hl=en.

decoder_heading: Information Collected by our “Sites” (our “Website” at www.mmguardian.com and our “Family Web Portal” at family.mmguardian.com)
ident_heading: Information Collected by our “Sites” (our “Website” at www.mmguardian.com and our “Family Web Portal” at family.mmguardian.com)
heading_content_part: As an alternative to installing the browser plug-in, particularly in internet browsers on mobile devices, you can prevent the collection of data by Google Analytics by clicking this link: Deactivate Google Analytics.This will save an “opt-out” cookie to your device, meaning that none of your data will be collected on this website by Google Analytics.

decoder_heading: Information Collected by our “Sites” (our “Website” at www.mmguardian.com and our “Family Web Portal” at family.mmguardian.com)
ident_heading: Information Collected by our “Sites” (our “Website” at www.mmguardian.com and our “Family Web Portal” at family.mmguardian.com)
heading_content_part: Please note that if you delete cookies in your browser settings, this may mean the Google Analytics opt-out cookie is also deleted and may have to be re-activated by you.More detailed information about the function of Google Analytics and the terms of use and privacy policy relevant to this service can be found under http://www.google.com/analytics/terms/gb.html and http://www.google.de/intl/en/policies/privacy/. We would also like to point out that our website uses Google Analytics with the anonymizeIP extension so that IP addresses are only processed further in an abbreviated form to prevent them being directly linked to a particular individual.

ident_heading: SECURITY OF YOUR PERSONAL INFORMATION
heading_content_part: We are committed to protecting the information that you provide us. To prevent unauthorized access or disclosure, to maintain data accuracy, and to ensure the appropriate use of the information, we have appropriate procedures in place to safeguard the information that we collect. We follow generally accepted industry standards to protect the personal information submitted to us, both during transmission and once we receive it. No method of transmission over the Internet, or method of electronic storage is 100% secure, however. Therefore, we cannot guarantee its absolute security.

decoder_heading: SECURITY OF YOUR PERSONAL INFORMATION
ident_heading: SECURITY OF YOUR PERSONAL INFORMATION
heading_content_part: If you have registered to use MMGuardian you will have created a password for which you are responsible for keeping confidential. Do not share it with any other person, including us. If you believe your password has been misused, please advise us immediately.
